chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 299 of 2021 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No. 3065/2021. 2. For orders on CMA No. 3066/2021. ------------------ 18.02.2021 Mr. Shahzeb Akhtar, Advocate for plaintiff. ------------------ 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. By means of this application filed under Order XXIII, rule 1, read with Section 151 C.P.C., the plaintiff seeks withdrawal of the instant suit. There is no impediment in allowing this application; hence, the same is allowed and consequently the instant suit stands dismissed as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications, if any. JUDGE Athar Zai
